wiki.summary: “FATHER” sees Ye and Travis reunite after 2024’s “FUK SUMN” from Ye and Ty Dolla $ign’s collaborative album VULTURES 1. The song was first previewed through a Beats by Dre ad on December 19th, 2025, and was later revealed to be part of BULLY after Ye tweeted the official tracklist on March 25, 2026. It was then previewed in full during a live-streamed BULLY Listening Party on March 27, 2026, before officially releasing on March 28, 2026 alongside a music video. Read more on Last.fm.
